name: DebridHub
description: Replaces the *arr stack: direct streaming via self-refreshing .strm files, batch downloads, Torznab search, a watchlist, a Seerr/Jellyseerr request webhook, and a library organizer.
overview: Stream and batch-download from Real-Debrid / AllDebrid inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: Adds TorBox as a debrid provider alongside Real-Debrid and AllDebrid. Pick it in settings and paste your TorBox API key. Implements add-magnet, torrent list/status, per-file download links (requestdl) and delete against the TorBox v1 API.
